message:
feat(command,store): implement 18 new Redis string/key commands with glob matcher and conformance log validation

Major feature expansion adding Redis string and key management commands with
comprehensive test coverage:

Store layer (fr-store):
- Add APPEND, STRLEN, MGET, SETNX, GETSET, INCRBY, PERSIST, TYPE, RENAME,
  RENAMENX, KEYS, DBSIZE, FLUSHDB operations
- Implement full Redis-compatible glob pattern matching for KEYS command
  supporting *, ?, [abc], [^abc]/[!abc], and backslash escaping
- Add StoreError::KeyNotFound variant

Command layer (fr-command):
- Add dispatch routing and handlers for APPEND, STRLEN, MGET, MSET, SETNX,
  GETSET, INCRBY, DECRBY, DECR, EXISTS, TTL, PERSIST, TYPE, RENAME,
  RENAMENX, KEYS, DBSIZE, FLUSHDB/FLUSHALL
- Enhance SET with EX, NX, XX, and GET option support

Runtime (fr-runtime):
- Add error mappings for CommandError::NoSuchKey and StoreError::KeyNotFound

Conformance (fr-conformance):
- Add structured log emission validation to fixture and protocol runners
- Add RuntimeEvidenceContext for runtime-to-structured-log event conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
